repair_candidate.summary: Repair editable contributor PR #88581 as a narrow command-core phase: keep /name registration, runtime handler wiring, implementation, and focused tests; use the existing command metadata marker after successful session label writes; defer slash-command documentation to a separate follow-up.
repair_candidate.pr_title: feat(commands): add /name command for session rename
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs #88581 as the command-core slice of chat-native session naming.
- Adds `/name <title>` to rename the current session from chat using the existing session label validation and uniqueness rules.
- Marks command session metadata changed after successful label writes so subscribers use the shared refresh path from #88690.
- Keeps this pass limited to command-core files; slash-command docs are deferred to a follow-up.

## Credit
This carries forward the implementation and product direction from @BSG2000's source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88581.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/commands-name.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
credit_notes: Preserve @BSG2000 attribution in the repaired PR body and release-note context for the user-facing /name command.
Do not carry the docs/tools/slash-commands.md update in this command-core repair; open or plan a separate docs follow-up after the command-core branch validates.
